notes: Bulk Commons import WITHOUT portrait ML filter (speed run). Expect some group shots/non-portraits — run tools/prune_non_profile_faces.py and/or pool-qa.html. See cai-laowai/ATTRIBUTION.md. Relaxed license matcher (--relaxed-license). Title heuristics off (--relaxed-title); more non-portraits possible.
